message:
feat(lab): enhance InjectionReport with actionable failure information

Add comprehensive reporting features to LabInjectionReport:
- Human-readable Display impl with summary statistics and failure details
- to_json() method for CI integration (JSON format)
- to_junit_xml() method for test framework integration (JUnit XML)
- reproduction_code() helper for each failure (copy-paste ready)

This implements asupersync-5m4h and builds on the cancellation injection
integration (asupersync-aaiv). All 12 injection tests pass.

Acceptance criteria met:
- Human-readable summary with counts
- Detailed failure information with oracle violations
- Reproduction instructions for each failure
- JSON and JUnit XML output formats
- Clear pass/fail verdict

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
